global.description: The ad features a cashback offer with a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Earn cashback daily with no hidden fees.

elements.label: CoinBridge logo
elements.description: A small logo positioned at the top left corner, featuring the text 'CoinBridge' in a simple font.

elements.label: Cashback offer text
elements.description: A prominent text area in the center displaying 'Earn cashback daily' in a bold, clear font.

elements.label: No hidden fees text
elements.description: A smaller text below the main offer stating 'No hidden fees' in a lighter font.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A rectangular button in the center with the text 'Claim reward' in a bold font, designed to attract attention.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: Various geometric shapes in the background, including an oval and a rectangle, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: A large rectangle shape in the center, possibly serving as a background for the text.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circular shape positioned towards the bottom left, adding to the decorative elements.
